gt_sql: SELECT DISTINCT(t1.player_name) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t2.potential = (SELECT MAX(potential) FROM Player_Attributes)
pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE pa.potential = (SELECT MAX(potential) FROM Player_Attributes)
question: List all the football player with the highest potential score.
